roadmaps.title: AI Engineer Roadmap
roadmaps.description: A structured path from Python basics through ML fundamentals, LLMs, and production AI systems. Covers data pipelines, model evaluation, RAG, and agentic workflows.

roadmaps.title: Frontend Developer Roadmap
roadmaps.description: A curated roadmap for developers targeting modern frontend roles. Covers HTML/CSS fundamentals, JavaScript ES2024, React 19, Next.js 15, testing, and performance optimisation.
